title: More Foods!
description: adds more foods and some tools!
body:
# **Main Description**
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![image of icecream in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c3a6da5c643366dfe0c0de8550354c2afed9e27.png)

This mod is made to add many more foods to the game, some with good effects, and some with bad effects. This mod also adds some tools themed after food (mainly choclate)! (it is required for the server to have the mod if used on a server or using essential to play with friends)

## Install guide on web
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
To install this mod to your game from the modrinth website, you will have to click the file you want to download (mainly the latest update). Then, you will want to find your minecraft folder, and choose your modded instance (assuming you have already installed fabric). Finally you will go to your mods folder and put the .jar file in the mods folder. You can now launch the game and the new foods should be there!

## Install guide on the Modrinth app
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
To install on the app, just click on the "install" button while searching for it, and it will install the latest release version, not beta version. If you want the beta version,click on the icon whikle searching it up, and then go to versions, you should see all versions including the beta ones, install the one you want and you are on your way!

## bug report
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Report bugs to this discord server: [https://discord.gg/fvK9CNTFQJ](https://discord.gg/fvK9CNTFQJ). You can also use this discord server to suggest foods not yet in the mod!

## updates
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This section will be used to update on what is going on with the mod.

recent:
The mod won't compile into a .jar file properly and i have not figured out why, if you want to help me, here is the mcreator topic link: [the topic](https://mcreator.net/forum/110334/how-do-i-fix-build-error)
